text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop thinking about the Special Carrot
Overload Set that Oguri's eating...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I've got a race coming up, so I can't eat too
much, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But... it's all I can think about!
choice_data_list:
It's important for your meals to be balanced
right now!
You'll be fine as long as you exercise afterward!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right... I guess I'll pass for today...
choice_data_list: We can chow down once you win your race!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okey dokey! Then I'll make sure to win!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right! After all, they say it's bad to never
treat yourself!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It won't be a problem as long as I burn the
calories during training!
